title: lotononis platycarpa var. persica
intro: Lotononis platycarpa var. persica is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the Persica lotononis. It is native to Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Lotononis platycarpa var. persica include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various ailments.
